commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8b8b1b18684ab9d5b8c07ebac1f0634d7b576c96)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.ts` so the embedded attempt controller no longer acquires a session write lock at creation time and instead relies on per-write lock acquisition.

PR surface: Source 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main releases the lock for provider streaming but reacquires and retains it for later phases, so long tool/cleanup work can block queued follow-up runs until `session.writeLock.acquireTimeoutMs`. The linked issue also includes production timeout logs for that path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is a contributor/maintainer revision of the lock-lifetime design plus real behavior proof, not a safe ClawSweeper repair marker for this external PR.

target.title: [Bug]: Session write lock held for entire turn duration causes queued user messages to silently fail
target.author: lzyyzznl

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
